problem.title: Bellman-Ford Algorithm
problem.description:
Problem: Compute shortest path from source and detect negative weight cycles using Bellman-Ford.

Input:
- n vertices
- m edges (u,v,w)

Output:
- Shortest distances OR NEGATIVE CYCLE

solution.explanation: Relax all edges n‑1 times, then check one more pass for further improvement to detect a negative cycle.
